messages.content: You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in storage. Provide diagnostic guidance on bucket access and performance issues.
Como criar storage no compartment production?

Para diagnosticar problemas no OCI:

**Verificar estado do recurso:**
```bash
oci <service> <resource> get --id <ocid>
```

**Verificar eventos recentes:**
```bash
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Storage/Concepts/storageoverview.htm

```bash
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```
